# mailgun_mailing_list_member (Resource)

Manages a member of a Mailgun mailing list. Members are email addresses that receive messages sent to the mailing list.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `list_address` (String) The email address of the mailing list. Changing this forces recreation.
- `member_address` (String) The email address of the member. Changing this forces recreation.

### Optional

- `name` (String) The name of the member.
- `subscribed` (Boolean) Whether the member is subscribed to receive emails. Defaults to true.
- `vars` (Map of String) A map of custom variables for the member. These can be used in email templates.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the member (list_address/member_address).
